title: AI-Powered Code Review Tool
description: A machine-learning pipeline that analyzes pull requests and provides contextual code review suggestions, reducing review time by 40%.

title: Real-Time Object Detection Dashboard
description: A browser-based dashboard that streams live camera feed and overlays bounding boxes using a YOLO model served from a lightweight FastAPI backend.

title: Generative Music Composer
description: Transformer-based model trained on MIDI data to compose short musical pieces in the style of classical composers.

title: Natural Language SQL Query Builder
description: Converts plain English descriptions into SQL queries using a fine-tuned language model, with an interactive web UI for querying a demo database.
